story.title: Your 'app' could have been a webpage (so I fixed it for you)

draft:
I just read about a developer who's been rewriting popular apps as web pages to prove they didn't need native code. 
This experiment highlights how often we default to building apps when a webpage would suffice. 
Key takeaways include reduced development time and increased accessibility. 
What are some instances where you've seen apps that could have been webpages, and did it impact user experience? 
#webdevelopment #nativeapps #softwareengineering
